reviews.title: Ridiculous reply that the room price included breakfast for adult only
reviews.text:
I had booked two rooms for two families which each family has two adults and one ten years old children.  It was clearly mentioned in the quotation from Agoda that breakfast was included.

When we checked in the hotel at 8:00pm on 29/3/2018, the front-desk receptionist only provide breakfast tickets for the four adults only.  When I told him that our booking should include 2 adults and one children for each room with breakfast provided, he just kept making a non-make sense reply that the room was a double beds room and therefore only two breakfast would be provided.  When I showed him the booking confirmation from Agoda, he told us that he needed to check with their Reservation Office, but could reply us until the office was at  9:00am next day.

We have no choice but had to give up the two breakfast since we had scheduled our sight seeing starting from 8:30.

Agoda and Hilton, please clarify whether my room booking should include breakfast for my children!

reviews.text: really bad experience with Hilton operated hotel. although it's well maintenace on this old building, however, it's just doesn't feel like staying at Hilton rather than staying a lower 3 stars hotel. Don't want to get any more comments and I won't recommand anyone to stay there.

reviews.title: Good staff. But needs better cleaning.
reviews.positives:
The staff are very warm and nice. Overall, found their service and hospitality to be pretty decent. Location wise too the hotel is situated well. Just a 6-7 min cab ride to Menara KL Tower, and a whole lot of shops/restaurants within walking distance. 

After checking out, I asked them if they could hold my luggage while I visited a nearby place. They happily obliged and kept my luggage safe. 

The food in the restaurant was pretty good. Though at the breakfast buffet, some of the items kept getting over soon, and replaced very slowly.
reviews.negatives:
The two main issues I faced because of which I decreased my rating are as below:

- When we went to the restaurant for an early lunch, part of the restaurant was being mopped up. And the smell was horrible. The kind of stink you get when the mop hasn't been cleaned properly over a period of time and there's chances of bacteria/mould growth. That smell made our lunch experience pretty dismal.

- After having a bath, I noticed that the shower wasn't draining water at all. It was all clogged up. I was already too tired and just wanted to go sleep. So I slid the cover of the drain and saw that there was a build up of hair, which was the reason for the clog. Used a few pieces of plastic to remove it and then the drain got cleared.

Effectively, I had to do the plumbing/housekeeping job for the room I was paying to stay in🥲

reviews.title: Let's become Diamond members and stay.
reviews.text: DoubleTree Hilton Naha is conveniently located near Asahibashi. Although it doesn't have a pool, it is clean and well-facilitated, and the breakfast is delicious. The hotel seems to value guests with high Hilton Honors status, as rooms are assigned on higher floors, and breakfast guests are guided to reserved seating through a priority lane. The treatment at the breakfast venue is quite apparent, with tables set with napkins and knives and forks (guests with lower status or non-members need to get these themselves), and they come to take beverage and coffee orders, while the kitchen distributes the day's special dishes (seating for those of higher status is bypassed). I believe staying at DoubleTree Hilton Naha after becoming a Diamond member will offer an even more satisfying experience.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
Service of Hilton are generally considered great on average in most cities but none in Japan. I respect Japanese high regard of national pride. Japanese should speak Japanese. It's just I can't keep thinking what about a good job done in Hilton? I would say Hilton is an international brand target to go big on global recognition, correct me if otherwise. This is too much low tier motel mistakes, mixed up Shampoo with Body Wash, struggle to fumble for the right words to respond to a customer need, curtly turn down a simple request on water at the front desk, etc. Looking into the Condo size of a motel room with plastic bathtub and washing faucet that cost higher than a grand again,  I welcomed my wife to Japan.

To be frank, it's no longer a brand name win-it-all era in the strong market tide.

reviews.title: Not value for money
reviews.text:
The location was amazing, being near the Naha bus terminal and metro station. It was very convenient for us to get around. However, for the price paid (~SGD$250/night), I felt it was not worth the money - the amenities were average and it seemed like an old building.  The price also did not include the hotel buffet breakfast. However, as we traveled during the CNY period, I am aware that prices tend to be higher then.

As for cleanliness, we expected the room/toilets to be thoroughly cleaned everyday during our 4-nights stay, however, the toilet was not swept (there was hair everywhere) and cups were not washed. Perhaps the disappointment came from the high expectations we had for Hilton hotels. Hopefully better luck next time!

We have already returned the rental car by evening, and when we checked out the next day, the staff checking out asked me twice whether we have used the parking. I felt that I was not believed and got questioned. House keeping personnel is sincere & helpful even with limited English on the 11th and 12th floor during our first and last day of the travel. Restaurant staff is not skilled at seating guests and table setting. Some tables with missing spoon and others missing fork. Buffet breakfast selection is limited. Chef for cooking eggs & omelet walks away from the station after serving 2 or fewer guests. We end up have to look over every now and then to wait for the egg chef to come out to get a pan-fried egg.

reviews.title: The staff was wonderful, but...
reviews.text:
I was attracted by the name Hilton and stayed for the first time, but to be honest, I have to say it was "disappointing." Here are the points I noticed in bullet form:
① "The bathroom smells peculiar" → It was probably the musty smell of the shower curtain, and it wasn't very pleasant.
② "The scent of the shampoo, conditioner, and body soap is unique" → My wife said it had a "middle-aged man's smell," which was indeed a unique scent. It was not floral or citrus, and it was definitely a smell I'm not used to.
③ "There are no amenities like combs or bathrobes" → I think most hotels these days have well-stocked amenities, but this felt lacking. Perhaps I should have reported this at the front desk?
④ "Wi-Fi is cumbersome" → This was the most frustrating part. I was exasperated that in addition to entering the ID and password, I had to input my address, name, phone number, etc. Moreover, all input had to be in Roman letters, which made me give up.
⑤ "There are no terms and conditions" → I thought it would be normal to have this in any hotel, but I couldn't find it even after searching the desk drawers. I wanted to look into it further...
☆ The staff were all very kind and friendly! I stayed for the NAHA Marathon, and I was especially happy that they encouraged me with "Good luck!"
I think the hotel's facilities definitely need to be more modernized.

reviews.title: The location is good.
reviews.text:
Good points:
- Great location. Right in front of the Monorail Asahibashi Station.
- Parking available. Costs 2000 yen.
- A bit removed from the bustling area around Kokusai Street, but a quiet place to relax.
- Welcome cookies are delicious.
- Staff is kind. Many foreign staff are present, and they greet you with a smile. Of course, they can communicate in Japanese.

Mediocre points:
- Used for a family trip with four people, but there were only two chairs in the room.
- The room's lighting is minimal, giving a somewhat dark impression.
- Few amenities. There's no facial toner, lotion, face wash, or cleansing products, so you'll need to bring your own.

Everything was fine except their bad service! We took the early flight and advised them when check-in. The staff proposed and promised us to prepare breakfast box for us. But when check-out they didn't do that and told us we didn't inform them! So we didn't eat or take out anything at Hilton because of no time.

We are not Japanese but basic Japanese we can speak/understand, and two of my families were very sure they took our request. It's a bad experience because the staff didn't even say sorry, it's very impossible to see Hilton's quality like this!

reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms Chee,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback with us.
We are pleased to hear that you found our location convenient and the value satisfactory. However, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the limited facilities and the issues with cleanliness during your stay. This is not the level of service we strive to provide.
Please rest assured that we have shared your comments with our housekeeping and operations teams, and we are taking immediate steps to improve the conditions you mentioned.
We truly appreciate your feedback, as it helps us improve our services. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again and provide you with a better experience.
Warm regards,

But there is no facilities, such as gym, table-tennis, swimming pool or any other recreational activities available, which I feel very disappointed. 
Furthermore when compare with the charge of the other hotel next-door  - 'Tokyo-inn', Double-tree is more expensive.

reviews.title: Clean and very close to monorail station
reviews.text:
I stayed in Doubletree by Hilton in Manchester before and was quite satisfied with their room size and quality. And since my girlfriend misses their welcoming cookies, I have no other option but to choose Doubletree again when we were planning a short trip in Naha, Okinawa. Again, it did not disappoint us, the welcoming cookies were still warm when we checked in and they were delicious. 
Despite it's just next to monorail station, it's of no use to us since we drive during our trip. And it takes about 15-20 min walk from hotel to get to the one and only tourist shopping street in Naha. 
Room quality wise is still up to standard and good value for money. Parking is 500 yen per day.

reviews.title: It’s ok
reviews.text: The staff were fantastic and very friendly and the location is pretty good being very close to the monorail and bus terminal. The room was nice enough if a little outdated. However almost nothing is included, you need to sign up to the Hilton rewards program to get wifi or “complimentary” bottled water. For the money there is likely to be much better options. If I return to Naha I will be staying elsewhere.
reviews.response:
Dear Paul,

Thank you very much for staying with us and for taking the time to share your feedback.

We’re delighted to hear that you found our staff friendly and appreciated the convenience of our location near the monorail and bus terminal. It’s always encouraging to know that these aspects contributed positively to your stay.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize that certain elements of your experience did not meet your expectations. We understand your concerns regarding the room condition and the limited inclusions for non-members. While some services are currently offered through our Hilton Honors membership program, we are continuously reviewing our offerings to ensure better value and comfort for all our guests.

We truly appreciate your honest feedback, and we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future with an improved experience.

reviews.title: It was convenient and close to the station.
reviews.text:
On a rainy day, I stayed for just one night. After getting off the elevator directly connected to the station, it took less than 10 seconds to reach the hotel entrance, so I was fine without an umbrella. 

The front desk service was also appropriate and smooth. It was a hotel that I would like to use again if the opportunity arises.

この度は、那覇市内の数あるホテルの中からダブルツリーbyヒルトン那覇をお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: Not your typical Japanese business hotel room size
reviews.text: This is a nice place to stay. The parking is limited in back of the hotel but you can use the 3rd and 4th floors for parking at the structure behind the hotel. I mentioned this but there wasn't anything that they could do.  Aside from that, this is a great place to stay.

宿泊に良くなかった点はありませんでした。ありがとうございました。

追伸
日本旅館をディスったＣＭは残念な気持ちになりました。ヒルトン好きだったけど、とても残念です。先日有馬温泉の老舗旅館はとても素晴らしい対応でした。比べるものが違いましたね。吉野家とフランス料理は比べないでしょう？カテゴリーが同じところで勝負してください。マリオットグループ、ＩＨＧグループは私はどちらもプラチナエリートメンバーです。私はＪＷマリオットや、インターコンチネンタルとダブルツリーを比べたりしませんよ。
沖縄旅行ではダブルツリーヒルトンが沢山あるのでありがたいです。今後も宿泊します。

reviews.response:
kuniko 様

この度は、那覇市内の数あるホテルの中からダブルツリーbyヒルトン那覇をお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございました。
モノレールに近い立地をお褒めいただき、大変嬉しく思います。

アメニティについてご期待に沿えず、申し訳ございませんでした。貴重なご意見をいただき、ありがとうございます。

今後ともお客様に安心してご滞在いただける環境を作るのはもちろん、ホテルライフを満喫していただけるサービスをご提供できるよう日々精進してまいります。

またのお越しを心よりお待ち申し上げております。

reviews.response:
Dear Arnel,

Thank you very much for staying with us at the DoubleTree by Hilton Naha, and thank you very much for taking your valuable time to place comments for us.

We are thrilled to hear that you had a great experience with us.  

Your satisfaction is our top priority, and we look forward to welcoming you back soon!

reviews.title: smaller hotels were generous
reviews.text: We stayed in this hotel for 2 nights. Rooms were comfortable, staff were extremely helpful and English speaking.  We were given the signature chocolate chip cookies just like all Hiltons. What we did not feel good is the fact that on the day we checked in there was only 1 sachet of coffee and 1 sachet of tea in the cabinet. Earlier on we have already stayed in three other hotels in different parts of Okinawa and there were not famous brands BUT they were generous with good blends of coffee and tea, sugar etc.  I think for the amount we pay, Hilton can stock up more coffee and tea.  Otherwise I would give this place 6/10

reviews.title: Great location next to monorail station
reviews.text:
The room is spacious and equipped with amenities. Sadly, we were informed that since we booked through Agoda, the room will not come with bottled water.  This is odd for a reputable hotel chain to hold back a basic service. 

The location is wonderful as we didn’t need to push the luggage through long walks since it’s located conveniently opposite the station and the lift is less than 1min walk away. 

Staff is friendly and helpful.

reviews.title: Good Location and Excellent Service ^_^
reviews.text:
1. Excellent Service before Check-in. I bought a lot of products in Amazon Japan before arrive. I just send all the parcels to the hotel and they help me to keep it safe. Once we are arrived, they send all the parcels to my room. Excellent Service!!!  

2. Very Nice Staff. Most of the staff is very nice and they can speak in English.  

3. Good Location. The monorail station is in front of the door, and very near to Kokusai-Dori street.  

4. Room is bigger enough and clean. We are booking a Triple Guestroom. It is bigger enough for two adult and one young child. The room is very clean, and it is very silent so I can't hear any voice from the room, very good.  

5. Nice Mattress. I like this Mattress and I can sleep very well.  

6. Breakfast is just OK! Breakfast is the only one thing that I am not very satisfied, it is just OK!!!
reviews.positives: Excellent Service & Nice Staff, Good Location & Cleanliness

reviews.title: Centrally located
reviews.text:
We stayed for 4 nights in Doubletree by Hilton Naha. It locates in the centre and near to the monorail. Rooms are quite new and big enough for 2 people. Clean, tidy and staffs are nice.
Speedy free wifi is provided, good for tourist and business purpose. Breakfast is also great!

reviews.title: Worth the money and exceed our expectations
reviews.text:
We traveled as a group of 3 and we liked the Doubletree by Hilton Naha a lot. The hotel is centrally located as it is merely a 3-minute walk from the monorail station to the hotel lobby. To go to the airport, it only takes you about 15 mins by monorail. For going to Kokusai Street, you can either walk for about 10 mins or just travel to the next monorail station. There is a Family mart convenience store located about 3-minute-walk away and many Japanese style pubs nearby. 

The hotel only charges you JPY500 for parking per night, which is much cheaper than we thought! Nice breakfast, standard (i.e. VERY CLEARN) room and bathroom. We stayed in a 3-bed bedroom and the single beds are actually quite large and very comfy. Very quick check-in and check-out service as well. There are also ice dispensers, vending machines, and an laundry room located in different floors of the hotel and they only charge you very reasonable place. I totally recommend the Doubletree by Hilton Naha to anyone who wants to stay in the city.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, very clean room and large enough beds.

Wifi is available at lobby. Breakfast buffet is acceptable and the price is reasonable.
The hotel is very close to monorail and Naha bus terminal, it is very convenient for travelling around Okinawa.

reviews.title: helpful staff
reviews.text:

Lobby is small but lovely designed. Room is in good size and router is provided for in-room wi-fi, only there are not enough plugs for chargers. 

Staff are very friendly. We were asking about the sked of a particular bus that went to the outlet mall. They showed the sked and suggested another one which fits our sked more.

reviews.title: Quick Overnight
reviews.text: Stayed here to get to airport in the morning. Close to dining and nightlife. The room was pretty small though, which made it difficult because I had multiple bags.
reviews.response:
Dear Drew

Thank you for choosing DoubleTree by Hilton Naha for your stay before your morning flight.

We are glad to hear that our location was convenient for your travel plans, with easy access to the airport as well as nearby dining and nightlife options. We hope this helped make your stay in Naha more comfortable and efficient.

We also appreciate your comment regarding the room size. While our rooms are designed to be functional for a city hotel stay, we understand that space can feel limited when traveling with multiple bags.

Thank you again for sharing your review. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back whenever your travels bring you to Naha.

reviews.title: The hotel is big and nice, but why is the parking lot...
reviews.text: The room size, room condition, staff's attitude, welcome cookies, and kids' amenities were all great due to the careful consideration, but I was not informed at all about the use of the external parking lot and the additional fee for that. I was disappointed about this.
reviews.response:
이번에 저희 호텔을 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
또한 숙박과 관련하여 소중한 의견을 보내주신 데 대하여 깊이 감사드립니다.
객실의 크기와 상태, 직원들의 응대, 웰컴 쿠키, 키즈 어메니티 등 여러 부분에서 만족하셨다는 말씀을 전해 듣고 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
그러나 외부 주차장 이용 안내 및 추가 요금 발생에 대해 사전에 충분한 설명을 드리지 못하여 불편과 혼란을 끼쳐 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다.
고객님께서 지적해 주신 사항은 내부 안내 방식과 직원 간 정보 공유 절차를 재점검하여, 같은 일이 재발하지 않도록 즉시 개선해 나가겠습니다.
저희 호텔을 선택해 주신 고객님께 불쾌한 경험을 드린 점 다시 한 번 깊이 사과드립니다.
다음에 다시 방문해 주실 기회가 있다면 더욱 편안하게 머무르실 수 있도록 전 직원이 최선을 다하겠습니다.
소중한 의견을 보내주셔서 다시 한 번 감사드립니다.
감사합니다.

reviews.title: The service is excellent.
reviews.text: I used it for business, and it was excellent. The staff at the breakfast venue and the staff during check-in were very hospitable, smiling, and made my stay enjoyable. The breakfast included delicious shabu-shabu and paella. The location was great, with izakayas nearby, and the monorail made it easy to access International Street right away.
reviews.response:
REIKO 様

この度は、沖縄でのご滞在にダブルツリーbyヒルトン那覇をお選びいただきまして誠にありがとうございます。 
お客様を当ホテルのゲストとしてお迎え出来ましたことをとても嬉しく存じます。

スタッフのホスピタリティや朝食に関するお褒めの言葉、大変嬉しく思います。特に、しゃぶしゃぶやパエリアをお楽しみいただけたとのこと、私たちの料理がご期待に添えたことを光栄に思います。

また、立地についてもご満足いただけたようで何よりです。周辺の飲食店や観光地へのアクセスが便利な点は、多くのお客様に喜ばれております。

今後もお客様に快適にお過ごしいただけるよう、スタッフ一同努めてまいりますので、またのご利用を心よりお待ちしております。

reviews.title: Very good location
reviews.text: The hotel is right next to Asahibashi station, which connects directly to the airport - this is very convenient for arrival and departure. The hotel also has a car park behind, and it was quite easy to get a parking lot even late at night. The welcome cookies are a nice touch! A surprise was that they don't always provide bottled water in your room (apparently you only get that when you book directly with the hotel), but that aside, it was a comfortable stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Adrian,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us!

We're delighted to hear that you found our location convenient, especially with the direct connection to the airport. It's great to know that our parking facilities met your needs as well.

We appreciate your kind words about the welcome cookies; we love adding special touches for our guests. 

Regarding the bottled water, we apologize for any confusion and appreciate your understanding. Your feedback is valuable, and we will ensure to communicate this more clearly in the future.

Thank you once again for your review, and we hope to welcome you back for another comfortable stay!

reviews.title: Employee services and transportation environment are excellent.
reviews.text: The staff service and breakfast menu were excellent. The hotel is older and the size is relatively small compared to the price, but I understand due to its location in a tourist area. The transportation environment around the airport and international street was excellent. The monorail station and bus terminal were right in front of the hotel, making it very convenient to get around.

If you are taking Jetstar, it’s very convenient for early flight departure. 3 stations away from international street. 20 mins taxi ride to American Village (cost abt JPY 32,500 with no traffic jam). 

10-15 mins walk to nearest Lawson and Family Mart.
